# HQ Residences Miami

422 NE 29 St Miami FL 33137

## HQ Residences Miami – Preconstruction Condos in Edgewater

HQ Residences Miami is a 35-story, 229-unit condominium tower coming soon to the heart of [Miami’s Edgewater neighborhood](https://www.miamicondoinvestments.com/edgewater-condos "Edgewater Miami"). Developed by Black Salmon, The Boschetti Group, and Constellation Group, in collaboration with HQ Hotels & Residences by sbe, this landmark project marks the first residential development from the HQ brand founded by hospitality visionary Sam Nazarian. The design is led by world-renowned architecture firm Arquitectonica, with interiors curated by DesignAgency and Craft Studio. Enzo Enea is overseeing the lush landscape architecture, while construction completion is anticipated for 2029. The tower introduces a new standard of branded living in Miami, combining hospitality-inspired design, art, and wellness under one roof.

## Layouts & Residence Features

Residences at HQ Residences Miami feature open layouts ranging from one to three bedrooms, with interiors spanning 721 to 2,074 square feet, plus a limited collection of larger penthouses offering expanded layouts and panoramic views. Each home is designed to capture natural light through floor-to-ceiling windows and expansive terraces that frame sweeping views of Biscayne Bay and the Miami skyline. Interiors include Italian cabinetry in warm wood tones, premium stone countertops, integrated designer appliances, and spa-inspired bathrooms with walk-in showers and dual vanities. Every detail at HQ Residences Miami Edgewater reflects a lifestyle of sophistication and comfort, blending Miami’s contemporary aesthetic with HQ’s signature hospitality DNA. Prices start from the $850Ks.

HQ Residences Miami Promo Video - YouTube

Tap to unmute

[HQ Residences Miami Promo Video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=j7lFrnkEb4k) [Miami Condo Investments](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC4UxcmmFIS1DYxLo8b-7TXw)

Miami Condo Investments950 subscribers

[Watch on](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=j7lFrnkEb4k)

## HQ Residences Miami Amenities

The extensive amenity program at HQ Residences Miami spans more than 15,000 square feet across two dedicated floors, designed around four pillars: Wellness, Entertainment, Community, and Art. The wellness floor, developed with THE WELL founder Kane Sarhan, includes contrast-therapy circuits, hammam, sauna, steam, and plunge pools, as well as an open-air fitness terrace and private treatment rooms. Above, residents enjoy entertainment and social spaces such as a chef’s kitchen, podcast studio, library, and Marc’s, an exclusive speakeasy curated by Marc Anthony. Additional highlights include TOMA Gourmet by Sofía Vergara, Jack’s NYC Coffee, and the HQ Social Club, offering members VIP access to events and curated experiences across Miami.

## HQ Residences Miami Location

Located at 422 NE 29th Street in Edgewater, HQ Residences Miami sits within one of Miami’s most exciting cultural districts, surrounded by Wynwood, the Design District, and Midtown Miami. Residents will enjoy proximity to waterfront parks, art galleries, and fine dining, including Michelin-starred restaurants and world-class retail destinations. The building’s central location provides easy access to Downtown Miami, Brickell, Miami Beach, and Miami International Airport, all within a 10- to 15-minute drive. With its blend of luxury design, brand-driven lifestyle, and unbeatable location, HQ Residences Miami Edgewater represents the next evolution of branded living in the Magic City.

[**HQ Residences Miami – Fact Sheet**](https://www.miamicondoinvestments.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/HQ-Residences-Miami-Fact-Sheet.pdf "HQ Residences Miami fact sheet")

web.markdown:
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68e7555d92bde19b0e63c7e3/69022f25ed072e68f01288ca_hq-residences-landing.avif)

# Crafted for a Life in Balance

HQ Residences is a new expression of living in Miami—where architecture, landscape, wellness, and hospitality come together with intention. Conceived by a global team of visionaries, it offers **one-, two-, and three-bedroom residences** shaped by light, calm, and connection. Here, mornings

unfold in quiet beauty, evenings gather in warmth, and life finds its natural rhythm between city and bay.

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68e7555d92bde19b0e63c7e3/69022f25ed072e68f01288ca_hq-residences-landing.avif)

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68e7555d92bde19b0e63c7e3/693258ebe4cb1e8d923a096b_d76723ed22c212c96a63e1a00e2e5b69_hq-residences-home-6.avif)

Life at HQ Residences moves effortlessly

between calm and celebration.

Step inside and sense it— a living space shaped by light, nature, and connection.

From the soft geometry of its architecture

to the warmth of its interiors,

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68e7555d92bde19b0e63c7e3/693258ebde44e4ec4fc3b416_hq-residences-home-5.avif)

Every detail, from the soft geometry of its architecture to the warmth of its interiors was crafted for balance.

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68e7555d92bde19b0e63c7e3/693258e9f33b7bdc7cd2ab3b_hq-residences-home-1.avif)![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68e7555d92bde19b0e63c7e3/693258ea9ffda5e4317e03d2_9c0f579c426e7ed23ee0b50f3ce9ca13_hq-residences-home-2.avif)![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68e7555d92bde19b0e63c7e3/693258ea24f17708ccf1e460_hq-residences-home-3.avif)![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68e7555d92bde19b0e63c7e3/693a41a229a87182ca32cd95_lucas-law-CPc-PzFL9H4-unsplash%201.avif)

Morning yoga above the bay. Work that feels inspired. Dinner with friends, or a nightcap at **Marc’s Speakeasy**.

‍‍At **HQ Residences**, well-being and enjoyment exist in balances, each elevating the other.

[LEARN ABOUT OUR BUILDING\\
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68e7555d92bde19b0e63c7e3/6932583ebd1680c1a80c0339_arrow.svg)](https://hqresidencesmiami.com/building)
